$schema_note: How a preposition + attached pronoun reshapes the gloss WORDING by referent. The lexeme stays fixed; only the rendered English changes with who/what the suffix points to. Attached pronouns ـه/ـها/ـهم/ـكم/ـنا change wording, not the head sense, and never invent a new stem. Never confuse ʾalif al-tanwīn (ـًا) with the pronoun نا — use tools.normalize_ar.ends_tanwin_alef(raw). The decisive guard: إِلَيْنَا is the jar-majrūr إِلَى + نا (root ʾ-l-y), it is NOT the root ل-ي-ن 'soft' — read with norm_strict/bare, never the recall-only norm().
generator: authored by hand; field names aligned to nahw/examples/function-word-decisions.jsonl

rules.base_sense: بِ = with / by / in / through (instrumental, locative, or oath, by context)

renderings_by_referent.gloss: in him / with him / by him
in it / with it / by it
in it / in him — believed IN

rules.reason: preposition + pronoun; the English 'in/with/by it/him' is fixed only once the referent is identified

rules.base_sense: لِ = for / to / belonging to (possession, benefit, or dative)

renderings_by_referent.gloss: for him / to him / belongs to him
for it / to it / belongs to it

rules.reason: the possession vs dative shade and him/it choice depend on the referent of ـهُ
jar-majrūr إِلَى + نا; e.g. ثُمَّ إِلَيْنَا مَرْجِعُكُمْ

hard_guard.do_not: do NOT analyze as root ل-ي-ن ('soft / pliant')
hard_guard.why: the ـنا is the 1pl pronoun, NOT a stem of layyin; norm() over-recalls to ل-ي-ن — re-read with norm_strict/bare before glossing
hard_guard.also: ends_tanwin_alef() distinguishes a genuine ـنا pronoun from ʾalif al-tanwīn ـًا on other tokens

rules.lexeme: عِنْدَ — adverb of place / iḍāfa head (ẓarf makān)
rules.base_sense: near / with / at; figuratively 'in the sight/estimation of'

renderings_by_referent.gloss: in the sight of / with Allah

rules.default_when_head_known: with / near / in the sight of (by construct head)
rules.reason: gloss the PHRASE role of the iḍāfa, not just the lexeme; the head noun of the construct selects 'near' vs 'in the sight of'

polyseme_guard.do_not: do NOT carry a same-root sense 'stubborn' (عَنِيد / عِنَاد) onto the ẓarf عِنْدَ
